blockingIssues.description: Commit b2af1aaf5d8acde300b1b777930048db957615a0 bundled out-of-scope version bumps in package.json, packages/extension/manifest.json, and packages/extension/manifest.firefox.json for a non-release refactor.

packages/extension/background/message-handlers-recording.ts no longer awaits recordingCoordinator.selectImages(), so recording_select_images now returns success before the async selection finishes and bypasses the prior error path when no recording session is active.

Commit 80a94959b2c822cd9cecb3360c65e50d10350fd5 bundled out-of-scope version bumps in package.json, packages/extension/manifest.json, and packages/extension/manifest.firefox.json for a non-release refactor.

Commit a1c32b9bd31f6c722e58a02aa6bc96430e369731 bundled out-of-scope version bumps in package.json, packages/extension/manifest.json, and packages/extension/manifest.firefox.json for a non-release refactor.

packages/extension/ai/message-factory.ts narrowed normalizeToolCalls() compatibility and no longer preserves legacy tool-call payload aliases such as top-level arguments, func, and tool, violating the message-conversion compatibility requirement; the same feature commit also bundled out-of-scope version bumps in package.json and both extension manifests.

Commit b2ce138f06ce8647606cdb940fd1963e01b9e0bd bundled out-of-scope version bumps in package.json, packages/extension/manifest.json, and packages/extension/manifest.firefox.json for a non-release refactor.

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/extension-core-notes.md documenting that check:repo-standards defaults to --max-lines=300 and therefore does not by itself enforce the mission's 200-line refactor limit.

Added .factory/library/extension-core-notes.md notes describing the extension-core AI/provider barrel entrypoints and the instance-* provider registry helpers so later workers can find the real implementation files faster.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a hard post-commit/HEAD diff gate for non-release refactors that rejects changes to package.json, packages/extension/manifest.json, and packages/extension/manifest.firefox.json, instead of relying only on staged-diff review or worker self-reporting.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Five extension-core reviews failed primarily because commits b2af1aaf5d8acde300b1b777930048db957615a0, 80a94959b2c822cd9cecb3360c65e50d10350fd5, a1c32b9bd31f6c722e58a02aa6bc96430e369731, and b2ce138f06ce8647606cdb940fd1963e01b9e0bd bundled package/manifest version bumps even though mission guidance forbids them for refactor features.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the validation contract for pure refactors: if integration tests are optional for a feature, require workers to record an explicit deviation; otherwise do not allow `followedProcedure: true` without a recorded final `npm run test:integration` result.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The passing compaction review still found a handoff that marked `followedProcedure: true` without the skill-required integration test, which makes scrutiny reviewers infer whether the worker skipped a required step or the procedure is overstated.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When the mission imposes a 200-line file limit, instruct workers to run `npm run check:repo-standards -- --max-lines=200` (or an equivalent explicit check) so the enforced guardrail matches the documented hard limit.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews noted that scripts/check-repo-standards.mjs defaults to 300 lines while the mission AGENTS.md declares a 200-line hard limit, so workers currently need separate ad hoc `wc -l` checks to prove compliance.

rejectedObservations.observation: Feature verification steps still reference `npm run test:unit -- --grep ...` even though the unit runner ignores grep filters.
Several reviews separately noted that handoff self-reporting should not be trusted without checking the actual commit diff.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the consolidated refactor-worker hard diff-gate recommendation above
